_meta.note: Private-seller BDP. Dealer BDP is a separate capture (TODO). Companion working doc: ../../BDP_FIDELITY_PLAN.md.

prev_boat.note: rendered when there's a previous boat

deep.note: breadcrumb is REPLACED by title/price/location, NOT appended

contact_pill.note: filled blue pill, always visible in sticky bar

content_order_private_seller: Engagement row (Views | Saves | New to Market)
H2 'Contact Private Seller' (generic — no owner name)
Lead form: Name (full) · Email + Phone (split) · Message
[Contact Seller] filled blue pill (button text is 'Contact Seller' not 'Email Seller')

engagement_row.note: K-format large view counts (e.g. 1.5k); pipe `|` separators between items

submit_button.note: FILLED pill; same text for dealer and private seller

private_seller_card_anti_patterns: NO owner-name in heading ('Contact Ravi, the owner')
NO disclaimer paragraph in card body
NO 'Show Phone Number' button before the form on listings without a known phone

info_tooltip.style: small gray ⓘ inline next to label

boat_details_section.background: plain white (NOT the #f5f9ff tinted card the sandbox currently uses — needs verification on a 2nd real BDP)
anti_patterns: NO 'More Details' accordion at H3 level

loan_calc_card.layout: 2-col grid: form left, preview + bullets right (light-blue bg right)

listed_by_section_visibility.private_seller: NOT rendered (real BT omits the section entirely for private sellers)
listed_by_section_visibility.dealer: rendered (NOT yet captured this session — TODO probe a dealer BDP)

_known_matches_in_fidelity_md: BDP grid 1fr+80+366 (v=47) — column width needs to be tightened to 366 (sandbox lands at 332)
Sticky breadcrumb 15/400/#333 (v=58) — superseded: sticky bar has TWO states; breadcrumb state is only one of them
Boat Details bg (v=56) — needs re-verification; real BT may NOT use the #f5f9ff tint
Lead form inputs 4px radius, outline button 2px (v=55) — submit button is FILLED, not outline
_capture_methodology: Open the real BT BDP in Chrome MCP at 1512×711. Run a JS probe that captures rect + computed-style for each anchor element (sticky bar, breadcrumb, H1, price, engagement, stats container, accordion summaries, footer cards). For interaction states (sticky deep-scroll) scroll to threshold (700px) and re-probe sticky bar text. Save measurements + label exact wording here. Re-run for a DEALER BDP to capture the right-rail dealer variant + Listed By + More From This Dealer regions.
